zh.Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England: 英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Pomeroy於大約1334年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Sir Henry De La Pomeroy44歲，母親Joanna Moels32歲。她於1360年與Sir James Chudleigh結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年6月14日之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Pomeroy于大约1334年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Sir Henry De La Pomeroy44岁，母亲Joanna Moels32岁。她于1360年与Sir James Chudleigh结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年6月14日之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Pomeroy was born about 1334, in Devon, England, her father, Sir Henry De La Pomeroy, was 44 and her mother, Joanna Moels, was 32. She married Sir James Chudleigh in 1360. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 14 June 1416, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Pomeroy est née environ 1334, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry De La Pomeroy, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joanna Moels, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Chudleigh en 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 14 juin 1416, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pomeroyが約1334年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry De La Pomeroyは44歳，母Joanna Moelsは32歳であった。1360年にSir James Chudleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年6月14日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Pomeroy(이)가 대략 1334년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry De La Pomeroy(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Moels(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1360년 Sir James Chudleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 6월 14일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Pomeroy родилась около 1334 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry De La Pomeroy было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Moels, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Chudleigh в 1360 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 14 июнь 1416 г. в её родном городе.
